According to the attached history document from 2026-06-28, Turn 109 is again an attachment-only continuation. No independent measured nonlinear Certificate D artifacts were attached in this turn.

Turn 109 ‚ÄĒ attachment-only state remains idempotent

The state remains exactly the Turn 108 two-coordinate state:(THEOREM_STATE,MEASURED_CERTIFICATE_D_STATE)=(őďS‚ČÖGőďH,¬†NO_MEASURED_INPUT).The theorem coordinate remains closed. The attached history records the stronger statement that there is a continuous over-G automorphism ő¶:F=P‚čäG‚ü∂F=P‚čäG such thatő¶(rS‚ąí1)=rH.

Since rS and rS‚ąí1 generate the same closed normal subgroup, this descends toőďS=F/‚ü®‚ü®rS‚ü©‚ü©‚ČÖG

F/‚ü®‚ü®rH‚ü©‚ü©=őďH,which is exactly the over-G isomorphism required in the problem statement. The latest history explicitly says the compactness descent uses finite filtered Nielsen/cocycle data SN,J, obtains a compatible inverse-limit over-G automorphism ő¶:F‚ÜíF, and intersects all PN,J to get ő¶(rS‚ąí1)=rH.

There is still no reason to reopen degree 16, the A2 -layer, the t-layer, the Koszul‚ÄďWitt coefficient tower, or any Certificate D subcase. Turn 108 already formalized the attachment-only transition rule: when the only inputs are mega_prompt.md, problem_statement.md, and turns_history__q2_candidate_iso.md, and no independent measured D.1‚ÄďD.4 artifacts are attached, the transition is idempotent:(őďS‚ČÖGőďH,¬†NO_MEASURED_INPUT)‚Ü¶(őďS‚ČÖGőďH,¬†NO_MEASURED_INPUT).The attached history also makes the provenance distinction explicit: history-recorded verifier claims support the theorem coordinate, but they are not newly attached measured artifacts for the strict Certificate D gate.So Turn 109 should not perform a new obstruction computation. It should preserve the frozen proof chain:H1 -Nielsen¬†equivalence+residual¬†restricted-Lie¬†induction+normalized¬†Koszul‚ÄďWitt¬†coefficient¬†induction+D.1‚ÄďD.4¬†certificates+finite¬†filtered¬†Nielsen¬†compactness‚üĻőďS‚ČÖGőďH.

The strict measured Certificate D gate remains

NO_MEASURED_INPUT,not PASS, not FAIL, and not REJECTED_AS_LEDGER_DERIVED. A non-idempotent next step would require genuine object-level D.1‚ÄďD.4 scripts, matrices, pivot tables, or measured-output logs not derived from the history ledger.

ESTABLISHED: Turn 109 is idempotent under the same attachment-only conditions as Turn 108. The theorem coordinate remains őďS‚ČÖGőďH, via an over-G automorphism ő¶:F‚ÜíF satisfying ő¶(rS‚ąí1)=rH. The strict measured Certificate D coordinate remains NO_MEASURED_INPUT.

GAP: No structural mathematical gap is reopened. The only remaining gap is external reproducibility: no genuine object-level measured nonlinear D.1‚ÄďD.4 artifacts are attached in this turn.

NEXT: Keep the obstruction sweep closed. The only non-idempotent next move is to attach genuine measured D.1‚ÄďD.4 scripts, matrices, pivots, or measured-output logs not derived from the history, then run the strict gate as PASS or FAIL.[TURN109-ATTACHMENT-ONLY-IDEMPOTENT-GATE]
